title: True Utility FishFace 18 In 1 Keyring Multi Tool Pocket Gadget: 18 Pocket Tools In 1 Keyring Pen, Multi Use EDC Key Ring Multitool With Box Cutter Knife, 6 Screwdriver Heads 4 Wrenches & Bottle Opener
features: 18 Tools in 1: FishFace is a versatile micro multi-tool that handles everyday tasks with ease, including opening boxes, tightening screws, and popping open bottles
Durable Construction: Made from black titanium-coated stainless steel, FishFace boasts a stunning visual appearance and strong construction, ensuring longevity and reliabili
Compact Design: With dimensions of 90mm x 18mm x 9mm and weighing just 20g, FishFace is similarly sized to a typical house key, making it convenient to carry wherever you go
Flight Safe: This product is 100% flight safe, allowing you to travel worry-free with FishFace by your side

Versatile Functionality: Featuring 18 tools in one, including Phillips and flat drivers, wrenches, hex drive, pry bar, file, nail cleaner, bottle opener, box opener, and a flight-safe cutter, FishFace is your go-to tool for any situation
description: From the manufacturer True was born out of the desire to do a lot with a little. Our mission is to create multi-functional tools that fit in your pocket, allowing you to tackle anything without having to quit, disrupt or postpone your daily activities. Fishface Keyring 18 in 1 Multitool FishFace is the perfect pocket tool. It’s an 18 tools in 1 multi functional micro multi tool. Perfect for those every day tasks such as opening boxes, tightening screws & gaining entry into cold bottles of crisp, refreshing goodness. Featuring: 3 x Phillips, 3 x flat drivers, 4 x wrenches, 1/4” hex drive, bicycle spoke spanner, pry bar, file, nail cleaner, bottle opener, box opener & a flight safe cutter. Made from Black titanium coated stainless steel. Fantastic Gift Flight Safe Strong Construction 18 Tools | Endless uses Bottle Opener Tough, durable and convenient bottle opener. Because every tool needs one! Phillips Driver The 'tail' of the Fishface, houses a small Phillips screwdriver. Box Opener The finger nail cleaner also doubles up as a handy box opener. Drivers Remove the bit from the holder to reveal 2x more drivers; medium and large Phillips. Cutter Integrated flight safe cutter, for all those bits of clothing thread, fishing cables and string. Wrenches Featuring 4x wrenches for everyday tasks; 4mm, 6mm, 8mm and 10mm. More Drivers The Fishface has a large flat driver at the top of the tool, and a small and medium flat driver either side of the nail pry bar. File The back of the tool includes a rough file, perfect for smoothing off rough surfaces.
